problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: Combining Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
